visual: Data Tables (Numeric Display). Same "Favorite Drinks" data visible.
visual_2: Picture Graphs (Mode 2: Creating). Vertical. 2 of 4 columns pre-filled: Juice=5 symbols (from EC.1 discussion), Lemonade=4 symbols. Milk and Water columns empty. Key visible: "Each ⭐ = 5."
prompt: "Set the heights for Milk and Water."
student_action: Hover over columns to preview, click to set Milk=3 symbols (15), Water=6 symbols (30)
on_correct: "You built the graph. Each symbol represents 5."
alignment: Tests same skill as Lesson 1.4-1.5 and 3.1-3.2 (creating picture graph from data table).
